users.title: Users
users.ownRoleTitle: You cannot change your own role

reset.title: Reset game
reset.introText: Resetting the game will, for every registered user:
reset.liMoveHomeworld: Move each homeworld to a new random position
reset.liResetProgress: Reset buildings, resources, and research back to a fresh start
reset.liClearFleet: Clear every stationed ship and in-flight fleet movement
reset.fieldHint: User accounts, usernames, and passwords are not affected — only game progress.
reset.confirmMessage: This will wipe every player's buildings, resources, research, fleet, and messages, delete all colonies, and move every homeworld to a new random position. This cannot be undone. Continue?
reset.doneMessage: The game has been reset. Every player now starts fresh.

defensePage.title: Defense
defensePage.noPlanetHint: You need at least one planet to build defenses.

espionagePage.title: Espionage
espionagePage.noPlanetHint: You need at least one planet to send espionage probes.

espionage.noProbesHint: No espionage probes stationed here. Build some in the Fleet page's shipyard, then send them from here.
espionage.coordinatesHintPrefix: Enter the coordinates of another player's planet. Find one in
espionage.dispatchedSuffix: once it arrives for the report or failure notice.
espionage.noDriveCapable: No researched drive is capable of this mission.

fleet.title: Fleet
fleet.noShipsOnPlanet: No ships available on this planet yet.
fleet.colonizeHintPart1: Needs at least one colony ship in the fleet. Any other ships sent along are stationed at the new colony once it's founded. Find a free slot in
fleet.attackHint: Enter the coordinates of another player's planet. On arrival the fleet battles the target's defenses; survivors return home and both sides receive a battle report.
fleet.transportHint: Delivers the loaded cargo to one of your own planets. Ships are not consumed - they're stationed at the destination.
fleet.bombardHint: Enter the coordinates of another player's colony (homeworlds cannot be targeted). Requires at least one Orbital Bomb and a Galaxy Class escort. If undefended, the bomb has a ~95% chance to permanently destroy the planet.
fleet.invadeHint: Enter the coordinates of another player's colony (homeworlds cannot be targeted). Requires at least one Invasion Unit and a Galaxy Class escort. If undefended, the invasion has a ~95% chance to capture the planet along with everything on it.
fleet.specialShipMutualExclusion: Orbital Bombs and Invasion Units cannot be sent together.
fleet.specialShipNeedsEscort: Orbital Bombs and Invasion Units cannot fly without an escort.
fleet.specialShipNeedsGalaxyClass: Orbital Bombs and Invasion Units require at least one Galaxy Class escort.
fleet.noDriveCapable: No researched drive is capable of this mission.

shipyardPage.title: Shipyard
shipyardPage.noPlanetHint: You need at least one planet to build ships.

highscore.title: Highscore
highscore.noPlayersYet: No players on the board yet.
highscore.rankHintSuffix: Keep going to climb into the Top 100!

featuresPage.title: Features
featuresPage.intro: An overview of what Battle of the Universe can already do - and what's coming next.

implemented.planets: Planet management: homeworld, colonization, renaming, and permanent destruction of conquered or bombarded planets
implemented.resources: Resources: Metal, Crystal, Deuterium, Hydrogen and Energy - with an individual production efficiency per building
implemented.buildings: 10 building types from the Command Center to the Construction Hub
implemented.research: Technology tree with per-planet research efficiency
implemented.fleet: 12 ship types (combat, civilian and special ships) and 7 mission types: Colonize, Station, Attack, Transport, Bombard, Invade, Espionage
implemented.defense: Defense towers to protect your planets
implemented.combat: Combat system with battle reports, orbital bombardment and planetary invasion
implemented.galaxy: Galaxy and system view with a full slot overview
implemented.messages: Messaging system for system and player messages
implemented.adminCatalog: Admin catalog editor to tune game balance directly in the browser
implemented.accounts: User accounts with roles (Player/Moderator/Admin) and language preference

featuresPage.plannedIntro: These features aren't built yet, but are next up.

multiPlanetBuild.title: Multi-planet construction
multiPlanetBuild.description: A table overview of all your planets in a system, making it easier to distribute build orders - for example, all planets can build a solar plant at once, or individual planets can get different orders. A warning appears if a planet doesn't have enough resources for the chosen build order.

tradingPost.title: Trading post
tradingPost.description: A trading post where ships can be sold for at most two resource types. Fixed upper and lower price bounds prevent any single player from gaining an outsized advantage from it.

clans.title: Clans
clans.description: The ability to join a clan with other players and play together as a community.

recycling.title: Recycling
recycling.description: A researchable technology: after losing a battle, the wrecks of destroyed ships - both yours and the enemy's - can be slowly recycled over a period of time, yielding extra resources on the planet.

research.title: Research
research.needPlanet: You need at least one planet to research from.
research.noResearchLab: No Research Lab built here yet.
research.selectActivePlanet: Select an active research planet above before starting research.
research.activatePlanetError: Could not activate this research planet.

systemView.title: System view
systemView.couldNotDetermineStartingSystem: Could not determine a starting system.

buildingsPage.title: Buildings
buildingsPage.noPlanets: You need at least one planet to build.

resourcesPage.title: Resources
resourcesPage.noPlanets: You need at least one planet to see resource production.

resourceProductionList.noProducingBuildings: No resource-producing buildings on this planet yet.

main_building.name: Command Center
main_building.description: The planet's core facility. Higher levels unlock construction of more advanced buildings.

metal_mine.name: Metal Mine
metal_mine.description: Extracts metal ore from the planet's crust.

crystal_mine.name: Crystal Mine
crystal_mine.description: Mines crystal deposits used in advanced electronics.

deuterium_synthesizer.name: Deuterium Synthesizer
deuterium_synthesizer.description: Extracts deuterium from surface ice for use as fuel.

refinery.name: Refinery
refinery.description: Refines raw ice deposits into hydrogen fuel for ship propulsion.

construction_hub.name: Construction Hub
construction_hub.description: Coordinates construction crews across the colony, speeding up every other building's construction by 1.5% per level.

solar_plant.name: Solar Plant
solar_plant.description: Converts sunlight into energy to power other buildings.

defense_facility.name: Defense Facility
defense_facility.description: Doesn't defend itself, but unlocks and coordinates ground-based defense towers.

light_fighter.name: Light Fighter
light_fighter.description: Fast, cheap interceptor. Thin armor - relies on speed and numbers, not resilience.

heavy_fighter.name: Heavy Fighter
heavy_fighter.description: An armored evolution of the Light Fighter. Trades some speed for significantly thicker plating.

light_cruiser.name: Light Cruiser
light_cruiser.description: An agile, offense-focused cruiser. Hits hard for its size but sacrifices armor to do it.

heavy_cruiser.name: Heavy Cruiser
heavy_cruiser.description: A defense-focused cruiser built to soak up damage. Slower and hits softer than the Light Cruiser, but far harder to bring down.

battlecruiser.name: Battlecruiser
battlecruiser.description: A capital-scale glass cannon. Devastating firepower for its cost, but armor plating lags well behind the Galaxy Class.

galaxy_class.name: Galaxy Class
galaxy_class.description: The largest and strongest warship in the fleet, equally formidable in attack and defense. Its size makes it the mandatory escort for Orbital Bombs and Invasion Units.

small_cargo.name: Transport Ship
small_cargo.description: Hauls large quantities of resources between planets.

colony_ship.name: Colony Ship
colony_ship.description: Carries the equipment needed to found a new colony.

espionage_probe.name: Espionage Probe
espionage_probe.description: Unarmed reconnaissance ship built to slip past enemy sensors and report back on a planet's fleet and resources.

orbital_bomb.name: Orbital Bomb
orbital_bomb.description: Unarmed, single-purpose ordnance capable of rendering an enemy colony permanently uninhabitable. Requires a Galaxy Class escort and cannot be sent alongside Invasion Units. Homeworlds cannot be targeted.

invasion_unit.name: Invasion Unit
invasion_unit.description: Ground-assault vessel capable of seizing control of an enemy colony intact. Requires a Galaxy Class escort and cannot be sent alongside Orbital Bombs. Homeworlds cannot be targeted.

energy_technology.name: Energy Technology
energy_technology.description: Foundation for more advanced power generation and weapons.

laser_technology.name: Laser Technology
laser_technology.description: Improves ship weapon damage output in combat.

shielding_technology.name: Shielding Technology
shielding_technology.description: Improves defensive shields on stationed ships and defense towers.

espionage_technology.name: Espionage Technology
espionage_technology.description: Improves probe sensor calibration, increasing the chance that an espionage mission successfully gathers intelligence before being detected.

chemical_drive.name: Chemical Drive
chemical_drive.description: Basic thruster technology. Enables travel between positions within a system. Cheap and improves steadily - overtakes the Ion Drive at high levels. Reaching level 3 unlocks research into the Impulse Drive.

ion_drive.name: Ion Drive
ion_drive.description: Higher-efficiency in-system thruster. Pricier and faster than the Chemical Drive out of the gate, but improves more slowly per level.

impulse_drive.name: Impulse Drive
impulse_drive.description: Enables travel between systems within the same galaxy. Cheap and improves steadily - overtakes the Warp Drive at high levels. Requires an in-system drive researched to at least level 3. Reaching level 5 unlocks research into the Hyperspace Drive.

warp_drive.name: Warp Drive
warp_drive.description: Advanced inter-system propulsion. Pricier and faster than the Impulse Drive out of the gate, but improves more slowly per level.

hyperspace_drive.name: Hyperspace Drive
hyperspace_drive.description: Folds space itself, enabling travel between galaxies. Requires an inter-system drive researched to at least level 5.

orbital_bombardment.name: Orbital Bombardment
orbital_bombardment.description: End-game weapons doctrine that enables the construction of Orbital Bombs, capable of permanently destroying an enemy colony.

planetary_invasion_tactics.name: Planetary Invasion Tactics
planetary_invasion_tactics.description: End-game ground-assault doctrine that enables the construction of Invasion Units, capable of seizing control of an enemy colony.

light_defense_tower.name: Light Defense Tower
light_defense_tower.description: A point-defense turret sized to match a light fighter's firepower.

heavy_defense_tower.name: Heavy Defense Tower
heavy_defense_tower.description: A hardened emplacement built to stand toe-to-toe with a cruiser.
